subject: Core/Exterior classification tags applied to site-index
body:
Archivist has applied Core/Exterior classification tags to the site-index as per the approved plan.

Summary:
- Core entries tagged: 1744
- Exterior entries tagged: 2083

The updated site-index is attached as evidence.

Please review and, if approved, use this to regenerate the site-index in your lane.

Evidence: S:/Archivist-Agent/evidence/graph-snapshots/site-index-with-core-exterior-tags.json
